data.chapter_title_en: Invocation for someone who gives you drink or offers it to you
data.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ أَطْعِمْ مَنْ أَطْعَمَنِي، وَاسْقِ مَنْ سَقَانِي)).
data.english_text: (O Allah, feed him who fed me, and provide with drink him who provided me with drink.)
data.transliteration: (Allahumma atAAim man atAAamanee wasqi man saqanee.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahumma atAAim man atAAamanee wasqi man saqanee.)
